title: marksync.lock.yml v1
description: The committed shared base: per-target DocumentId -> PageBinding (ADR-0006 C-2 / GH-19 F-2). Validated by ajv at load time; the TS mirror is lock-types.ts. The uuid is the documents key (not a duplicated field).

version.description: Lock schema version. v1 is the initial MS-0002 contract.

targets.description: Per-target bindings. Each target id maps to a documents map keyed by DocumentId (UUID v7).

documents.description: DocumentId (UUID v7) -> PageBinding. The uuid lives in the key, not the entry.

pageBinding.description: Mirrors the GH-18 PageBinding field set minus uuid (uuid is the documents key).

pageId.description: Confluence page id (remote identity — mutable, recorded in the lock).

parentPageId.description: Confluence parent page id at last sync.

pageVersion.description: Confluence page version number at last sync.

sourceCommit.description: Git commit sha the page was last synced from.

sourceContentHash.description: SHA-256 over the canonical source bytes.

renderedBodyHash.description: SHA-256 over the rendered page body.

remoteBodyHash.description: SHA-256 over the remote page body as last observed.

operationId.description: The apply operation id that last touched this binding.

toolVersion.description: MarkSync tool version that wrote this binding.

sourceBranch.description: Source branch name at last sync (GH-27). Optional for backward compatibility.

commitCount.description: Total commit count in the last sync (GH-27, ADR-0010). Optional for backward compatibility.

trimMarker.description: Truncation marker like "+3 more" (GH-27, ADR-0010). Optional for backward compatibility.
